title: Verify real media generation and fallback behavior
summary: Run a real diary sample through the pipeline and confirm image, audio, video, persistence, and fallback states behave truthfully.
acceptance: A real uploaded diary produces saved result JSON, media assets, and playable output.
If one media step fails, the rest of the result still renders with an explicit state.
Evidence includes URLs, logs, or screenshots tied to a concrete entry id.
